entity.label: Ethan

entity.description: A Levite of the family of Gershom (1 Chr. 6:21), probably the same as Ethan (42).

nodes.label: Ethan
nodes.description: A Levite of the family of Gershom (1 Chr. 6:21), probably the same as Ethan (42).

verses.text: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeaterai his son.
The son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei,
